name: Sri Krishna
availability: Open to applied AI and machine-learning opportunities

hero.eyebrow: Enterprise AI · Applied ML · Financial intelligence
hero.headline: I build AI systems for decisions that matter.
hero.description: Applied AI Engineer with 2+ years of experience turning industrial, enterprise, and financial problems into multi-agent workflows, predictive models, and human-in-the-loop decision systems.
hero.direction: Currently deepening statistical modelling and machine learning through the MITx MicroMasters while building toward quantitative ML engineering.

platform.summary: Four connected systems with distinct responsibilities across platform engineering, shared AI, human-guided trading, and statistical decision-making.

products.name: NETRA
products.statement: The place where every system runs.
products.description: NETRA provides the shared frontend, backend, authentication, terminal, knowledge infrastructure, and deployment foundation for the complete trading ecosystem.
products.detail: It hosts both human-in-the-loop and data-driven trading systems while keeping product experience, infrastructure, and shared services consistent.

products.name: MAYA
products.statement: The intelligence shared across the platform.
products.description: Manages agents, model orchestration, RAG, GraphRAG, retrieval, critique, contextual explanation, and the reusable AI services across NETRA.
products.detail: MAYA keeps model access, retrieval, orchestration, and future learning capabilities reusable instead of duplicating AI logic inside each trading system.

products.name: PINAKA
products.description: Combines agentic AI assistance with human authority across market structure, liquidity, auction state, context, execution, and risk.
products.detail: PINAKA turns discretionary trading knowledge into a structured decision process without removing the retail trader from the final decision loop.

products.name: TRISHUL
products.description: An end-to-end quantitative system built around evidence, probability, expected value, validation, portfolio construction, and systematic decisions.
products.detail: TRISHUL is hosted on NETRA's frontend and backend and can reuse MAYA's GenAI components, while its primary trading logic remains statistical and data-driven.

professionalProjects.name: Voice-Driven Multi-Agent Well Intelligence
professionalProjects.description: Architected the Well Agent so field operators can ask natural-language questions and receive contextual answers about wells, equipment, and operations.
professionalProjects.detail: Integrated speech-to-text, text-to-speech, Snowflake querying, session memory, response caching, direct agent routing, and deployment across Bedrock, AgentCore MCP, and Palantir.

professionalProjects.name: ESP Failure Prediction
professionalProjects.description: Developing a failure-risk workflow for Electric Submersible Pumps using multivariate operational and sensor time-series data.
professionalProjects.detail: Work spans data quality, rolling and trend features, classification baselines, tree ensembles, time-aware validation, calibration, and false-alarm analysis.

professionalProjects.name: Gross Margin Prediction
professionalProjects.description: Building a machine-learning workflow to estimate future gross margin from historical business and operational data.
professionalProjects.detail: The workflow connects data preparation, leakage-aware feature design, business baselines, regression model comparison, temporal validation, and interpretable outputs.

professionalProjects.name: COBOL Functional Documentation
professionalProjects.description: Engineered an LLM-assisted reverse-engineering workflow that turns undocumented COBOL applications into structured functional documentation.
professionalProjects.detail: Separated program-flow analysis, dependency interpretation, business-rule extraction, summarization, structured generation, and human validation.

professionalProjects.name: Excel-to-React Migration
professionalProjects.description: Developed a GenAI-assisted migration workflow that converts spreadsheet-driven processes into structured requirements for React applications.
professionalProjects.detail: Extracts formulas, dependencies, business rules, data requirements, interface behaviour, and validation logic while retaining domain review.

experience.summary: Individual contributor across enterprise GenAI, industrial predictive modelling, application modernization, and cloud AI deployment.
Built cloud-based machine-learning prototypes and worked across data processing, model deployment, and enterprise AI application workflows using AWS.
